title: calea bahiensis
intro: Calea bahiensis, also known as Bahia plant or tree daisy, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calea bahiensis include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Calea bahiensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
